name: Z Range With Arithmetic Endpoint
description: 1..n*2 — Range right endpoint is Multiply. UNCERTAIN per PARSER_NOTES anomaly #5: RANGE > FACTOR so Range may form before the Multiply binds. Semantic intent: Range(1, Multiply(n,2)). WILL_FAIL_UNTIL_FIX if parser actually returns Operator(Multiply,Range(1,n),2).
